Name: PAD_RUMBLE_PARAM
Description: Defines vibration strength and scaling behavior for the controller's large and small rumble motors.

Fields.Name: Large Motor: Power
Fields.Description: Base vibration strength of the large rumble motor.

Fields.Name: Large Motor: Initial Maximum Scale
Fields.Description: Starting scale multiplier applied to the large motor vibration.

Fields.Name: Large Motor: Midpoint Scale
Fields.Description: Scale multiplier applied to the large motor at the midpoint of the rumble effect.

Fields.Name: Large Motor: Final Maximum Scale
Fields.Description: Ending scale multiplier applied to the large motor vibration.

Fields.Name: Small Motor: Power
Fields.Description: Base vibration strength of the small rumble motor.

Fields.Name: Small Motor: Initial Maximum Scale
Fields.Description: Starting scale multiplier applied to the small motor vibration.

Fields.Name: Small Motor: Midpoint Scale
Fields.Description: Scale multiplier applied to the small motor at the midpoint of the rumble effect.

Fields.Name: Small Motor: Final Maximum Scale
Fields.Description: Ending scale multiplier applied to the small motor vibration.
